title: Full Stack AI Engineer (Agentic AI Orchestration)
description:
About the job

As a Full Stack Engineer specializing in Agentic AI, you will bridge the gap between robust backend systems and cutting-edge AI reasoning. You will design and deploy scalable applications where AI agents interact with APIs, databases, and users in real-time.




Key Responsibilities




Backend Development: Build and maintain scalable APIs and microservices using Node.js, TypeScript, and Python.
AI Orchestration: Design and implement agentic workflows using frameworks like LangChain, CrewAI, or AutoGen.
Frontend Integration: Develop intuitive, high-performance user interfaces using React or Next.js to visualize agentic reasoning and output.
Tooling & Integration: Create "tools" (API connectors, scrapers, database interfaces) that allow AI agents to interact with the physical and digital world.
RAG Implementation: Architect Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines using vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, Weaviate, or Milvus).
Optimization: Fine-tune prompts and orchestration logic to reduce latency, prevent "hallucinations," and optimize token usage.
DevOps/MLOps: Deploy and monitor AI-driven applications, ensuring reliability and observability in production.




Required Skills & Qualifications




Experience: 3+ years of professional experience in full-stack software development.
Languages: Expert proficiency in TypeScript/JavaScript (Node.js) and Python.
AI Knowledge: Proven experience working with LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Open Source) and understanding of Agentic patterns (Reasoning/Planning, Tool-use, Memory).
Frontend: Experience with modern frameworks like React.js and state management.
Databases: Proficiency in SQL (PostgreSQL) and experience with Vector Databases.
Infrastructure: Familiarity with Docker, cloud providers (AWS/GCP/Azure), and CI/CD pipelines.
Problem Solving: A "builder" mindset—someone who can take a vague requirement and architect a multi-step AI solution.




Preferred Qualifications 




Experience with agentic frameworks.
Contributions to open-source AI projects.
Experience with stream processing and WebSockets for real-time AI updates.
Understanding of Evals (evaluating AI performance/accuracy) and fine-tuning datasets.
posting_date:
Vishakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India · 19 minutes ago · 12 applicants

title: Backend Software Development Engineer
description:

We're looking for Backend Software Development Engineers (India)!

title: Frontend Developer
description:
About the job

Company Description

LogAI is a Unified Intelligence Platform designed to empower businesses with intelligent automation across sales, finance, HR, marketing, and operations. By leveraging AI-driven tools, LogAI enables businesses—whether they are startups, small enterprises, or scaling organizations—to enhance efficiency and achieve rapid growth. The platform features CRM and sales automation, billing and finance management, project and task management, and HR operations, providing an all-in-one solution. With its mission to make powerful automation accessible to all, LogAI ensures businesses can lead in an ever-evolving marketplace.




Role Description

This is a full-time, on-site Frontend Developer role located in Kochi. As a Frontend Developer, you will be responsible for developing, testing, and optimizing user interfaces to deliver a seamless and responsive experience. Your tasks will include collaborating with design and back-end teams to ensure alignment, writing efficient and maintainable code, addressing technical issues, and implementing best practices in front-end development.




Qualifications

Strong skills in Front-End Development, React, Tailwind, Typescript and Responsive Web Design.
Knowledge of Back-End Web Development and ability to collaborate effectively with back-end teams.
Proficiency in Web Development and Software Development for scalable and user-friendly applications.
Familiarity with modern frameworks, libraries, and tools for front-end development is a plus.
Experience with testing and debugging front-end performance issues.
Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field is preferred.

title: ful stack web developer
description:
About the job

Company Description

Periwinkle is a modern jewelry and home decor brand dedicated to creating elegant and authentically personal pieces. We combine contemporary design with timeless artistry, offering unique products that resonate with individual tastes. At Periwinkle, we believe in blending creativity and quality to craft beautiful, meaningful items that customers cherish. Join us to contribute to a brand that values innovation and personal expression.




Role Description

We are seeking a Full-Stack Web Developer for a full-time on-site role at our Bengaluru office. As a Full-Stack Web Developer, you will be responsible for developing, testing, and maintaining both the front-end and back-end components of our web applications. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless user experiences and efficient system performance. Additional responsibilities include optimizing web design and ensuring the usability and responsiveness of our digital platforms.




Qualifications

Proficiency in Front-End Development, including creating engaging user interfaces and ensuring responsiveness
Expertise in Back-End Web Development, including building and maintaining server-side logic
Strong knowledge of Web Development principles and best practices
Experience with Programming languages commonly used in web development
Understanding of Web Design, creating visually appealing and user-friendly layouts
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field
Familiarity with e-commerce platforms is a plus

title: Full-stack Developer
description:
About the job

Hiring in Chennai — Full-Stack Developer

30-day paid trial | Full-time | On-site role




Company Description

#OAS - Oru Althouse Studio is a creative studio that helps founders and businesses turn products, services, and ideas into standout brands.

We work on ad creatives, Meta ad campaigns, case-study-driven marketing strategies, lead-generation systems, and data-backed creative testing.

Right now, we are building internal and client-facing web tools that support creative campaigns, package recommendations, lead capture, landing pages, and business workflows.




Role Description

We are looking for a Full-Stack Developer to work with us full-time, on-site in Chennai.

You will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining both front-end and back-end parts of web applications.




The work will include:

Building responsive web pages and web apps
Converting Figma designs into clean, working code
Cleaning up Figma/Locofy exports when required
Creating user-friendly interfaces
Building backend logic, APIs, and database connections
Working with tools like Supabase or similar databases
Optimizing performance and fixing bugs
Connecting lead capture, booking, forms, and dashboard workflows
Collaborating directly with the founder and creative team
Taking ownership of tasks and shipping working features fast

This role is best suited for someone who has built real websites, landing pages, dashboards, SaaS-style tools, or dynamic content websites before.




Pay

₹30,000–₹50,000/month for the first 30-day paid trial, based on experience and portfolio.

If the work quality is strong, we will extend for the second month and discuss a better long-term role.




Qualifications

Experience in full-stack development
Strong front-end skills with React, Next.js, or similar frameworks
Good understanding of backend development, APIs, databases, and deployment
Experience working from Figma-based design references
Ability to build responsive and clean user interfaces
Good problem-solving skills
Understanding of web standards, usability, and best practices
Ability to work independently as well as with a small fast-moving team
Experience with landing pages, lead-generation websites, dashboards, or recommendation flows is a plus
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field is preferred, but strong practical skills and portfolio matter more




What We Are Looking For

We are not looking for someone who only “knows tools.”

We are looking for someone who can understand the product, think and discuss what business wants - I be providing Figma and flowchart, build fast, fix problems, and improve the output without needing to teach him/her step by step.




Basically, if you can take a Figma design, understand the business flow, build the frontend, connect the backend, and make the thing actually work - we should talk.




Location: Porur, Chennai

Role: Full-time, on-site

Trial: 30-day paid trial
